name: ai-sdlc
description: AI-assisted SDLC: drives a Jira issue to a merged PR. Stages: intake (pull Jira requirement + acceptance criteria), implement (generate code on a feature branch), verify (build & boot the app), automate (generate Playwright E2E for the acceptance criteria), run-ci (trigger Jenkins to run the automation and poll the report), ship (merge to main only when the Jenkins report is green). Commands: /sdlc:intake, /sdlc:implement, /sdlc:verify, /sdlc:automate, /sdlc:run-ci, /sdlc:ship, /sdlc:run. Skills: jira-intake, code-generation, app-verification, playwright-automation, jenkins-integration, merge-gate, sdlc-orchestrator. Agents: code-implementer, qa-automation-engineer, release-manager.
